title: Kiln event payload runtime session started

runtime_session_id.description: The runtime session that was started.

protocol_version.description: Protocol version spoken by this runtime session.

parent_process.description: Identity metadata for the parent process that launched or supervised this runtime session.

process_kind.description: The kind of parent process that launched the runtime session.

process_id.description: The operating-system process ID of the parent process, when safe and available.

process_start_time.description: When the parent process started, when safe and available.

executable_name.description: The executable or logical entrypoint name of the parent process.

supervisor_id.description: Stable identity for the supervising component, worker, or SDK instance, when available.

host_id.description: Opaque host or container identity, when safe to record.

sdk_version.description: Version of the SDK or client package that launched the runtime session, when applicable.

command_invocation_id.description: Opaque identity for the CLI or command invocation that launched the runtime session, when applicable.

database_id.description: Opaque identity for the database or persistence store used by the runtime session.

database_schema_version.description: Database schema version observed at session startup, when available.

startup_timestamp.description: When runtime session startup began or was recorded.

startup_mode.description: How the runtime session was started.

startup_reason.description: Human-readable or system-provided reason for starting the runtime session.
